metadata.notes: Poland PIT and ZUS parameters for 2026. Tax-free amount 30,000 PLN realized via a 3,600 PLN tax-reducing amount. ZUS pension/disability base capped at 282,600 PLN/yr (2026); sickness uncapped. Health 9% on gross minus ZUS, not tax-deductible since 2022. Relief for the young (under 26) exempts up to 85,528 PLN of employment income. Child relief is a tax credit. Single-taxpayer estimate; joint assessment assumes the entered income is the household income.
